query:
-- Distribution of active vacation requests per employee
SELECT 
  req_count,
  COUNT(*) AS employees
FROM (
  SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS req_count
  FROM requests
  WHERE request_type = 'vacation' AND status = 'pending'
  GROUP BY employee_id
) t
GROUP BY req_count
ORDER BY req_count;
